diagrams.title: MESI State Transition Diagram
diagrams.description: Shows the four states of MESI protocol and valid transitions between them
elements: Read hit, Write hit, Bus read, Bus write, Invalidate transitions
diagrams.purpose: Visualize how cache lines change state during operations and understand what causes false sharing (transitions to Invalid state)

diagrams.title: False Sharing in Parallel Loop
diagrams.description: Shows two threads updating adjacent array elements that share a cache line
elements: 64-byte cache line containing arr[0] (bytes 0-7) and arr[1] (bytes 8-15)
Arrows showing invalidation and reload operations
diagrams.purpose: Understand how independent writes to adjacent elements cause performance degradation through false sharing

diagrams.title: Padded vs Unpadded Data Structure
diagrams.description: Comparison of histogram array without and with cache line padding
elements: Unpadded: bins[0], bins[1], bins[2], bins[3] packed in 64-byte lines showing false sharing
Padded: bins with 60-byte padding per bin ensuring separate cache lines
Thread access patterns showing no invalidation with padding
diagrams.purpose: Visualize how padding eliminates false sharing and when to apply this optimization
